name: Kids' 18pc Plastic Drinkware Set Peach/Melon - Pillowfort™
description: Serve drinks to your kid in a unique style each day of the week with the 18-Piece Plastic Drinkware Set from Pillowfort™. This kid's drinkware set includes solid color and printed tumblers with lids and straws for conveniently sipping their favorite juices or other beverages. Made of plastic, this BPA-free drinkware set is suitable for cold drinks and boasts a dishwasher-safe design for easy cleanup after use. Best of all, the set has a stackable design for convenient storage after use.
